name: Nomi, Your Boss who Wants a Family
description:
Your new boss wants her corner store you were hired into to be a family business. But she doesn't have any family in this country...

This one's more simple than Bethany, much shorter of an intro, at the very least. If you have any feedback, please let me know, I check often for any comments or reviews. Expect more of this if you decide to Follow me. I have my Discord in my profile, where you can shoot me some ideas or anything like that.

Keep in mind, if the bot is repeating or anything like that, that isn't something I can fix, it's a problem with Janitor. Re-generate your response if it messes up or does something you don't enjoy. If you want to manipulate how the bot responds, you can tell it in parenthesis what you would like. For example: *Actions of your response.* "Speaking to Nomi." *Some more actions for flavor.* (Make Nomi recite the Bee Movie script in full. Start typing out her thoughts more descriptively)

Tags: Boss, Japanese, Family, MILF, Romance, Love
creator: HelloIAmLrGio
